rationale: Educ. Code §48.153 establishes a flat $275 per-student allotment for dropout recovery and residential placement students. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property values, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school is entitled to $275 for each student in average daily attendance who:
_note: No direct or indirect textual link between this statute and the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
